music.intro: Have you ever wondered what Login is listening to? Here is the answer!

albums.privacyNotice: Please respect the privacy of everyone photographed. Send an email to pr@login.no if you want any of the images removed.

fund.title: Login Fund
fund.intro: We are excited to present the Login Fund!

support.title: Apply to the Fund for support!
support.intro: Do you have an initiative or an idea where financial support would bring joy to most members of Login? Submit an application!
support.target: All groups and members affiliated with Login can apply. New initiatives are prioritized.
support.period: The fund board normally opens applications once per semester through Login's main communication channels.
support.apply: Send an email to fondet@login.no with the number of members or students involved and a complete budget.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.body: The purpose of the Fund is to provide Login with financial security and ensure that Login's surplus is fairly distributed among current and future members.

sections.title: Meetings
sections.body: Fund meetings are announced one week in advance. Everyone who wants to participate in the open quarter is encouraged to attend.

sections.title: Open quarter
sections.body: All fund board meetings start with an open quarter where Login members can raise questions, suggest topics, or bring other input.

sections.title: Yield
sections.body: The Fund has a long-term investment strategy with a low-risk factor, aiming for moderate but stable yield over time.

board.title: Fund Board
board.intro: The Fund Board manages the Fund's assets in accordance with its purpose.
board.body: The board consists of elected members. Want to know more? Contact fondet@login.no or talk to us in the hallway.

verv.title: Verv
verv.intro: Verv is a voluntary position for those with an extra passion or desire to make Login better.
verv.intro2: A verv gives extra responsibility and requires more effort, but it also creates opportunities to build friendships and join internal events.
verv.committeeTitle: What do you do with verv?
verv.committeeIntro: Login is made up of committees with different responsibilities. Here is the quick native overview.

apply.title: Apply for verv
apply.body: The committees accept applications continuously. If you have questions, contact the relevant committee leader or send Login a message.

photos.title: Nucleus launch party
photos.description: TekKom members at the launch party of the Login app.

photos.title: Login at Bedpres
photos.description: Login hosts company presentations throughout the semester.

photos.title: PR playing table tennis
photos.description: Several members of PR playing table tennis.

committees.title: Evntkom
committees.intro: Evntkom is responsible for Login's events.
committees.body: With verv in Evntkom you help host events, become visible on campus, and get to try new social activities.

committees.title: TekKom
committees.body: You can help with existing projects like the website and app, or start something new. TekKom needs both developers and designers.

committees.title: Bedkom
committees.intro: Bedkom is Login's face towards companies.
committees.body: Bedkom handles company presentations, career days, company communication, promotion, and recruitment.

committees.title: CTFkom
committees.body: CTFkom creates and hosts CTF events, company CTFs, and helps students improve through Capture The Flag competitions.

committees.title: SATkom
committees.body: SATkom works with budgeting, accounting, financial routines, and keeping the Login Lounge stocked and functional.

committees.title: PR
committees.body: PR manages public media channels, graphic material, merch, photography, and visual content for events and projects.

committees.title: BarKom
committees.body: BarKom helps create safe and social events through serving, purchasing, planning, logistics, and behind-the-scenes responsibility.

policy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: About our Privacy Policy
sections.body: This Privacy Policy governs the Login mobile application, developed and maintained by Login - Linjeforeningen for IT, a registered non-profit organization serving the student community at NTNU Gjøvik in Norway.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.body: Safeguarding user privacy is important to Login. This policy outlines our practices for data collection, usage, sharing, and your choices concerning your information.

sections.title: Information Collection
sections.body: The Login app does not collect personally identifiable information or sensitive data from its users. We do not require personal details such as names, email addresses, or contact information to use the app.

sections.title: Utilization of Information
sections.body: Because the app does not collect personal information, there is no personal information to analyze, track, profile, sell, or trade.

sections.title: Information Security
sections.body: Although we do not collect user data, we maintain security measures intended to protect the app and its infrastructure from unauthorized access or breaches.

sections.title: Non-Disclosure of Information
sections.body: In line with our non-data-collection policy, we do not share user information with third parties.

sections.title: Transparency and Communication
sections.body: We aim to provide clear information about privacy practices and invite users to contact us with questions, concerns, or feedback.

sections.title: Policy Updates
sections.body: We may update, modify, or amend this Privacy Policy. Changes are effective when posted in the app or on Login's services.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.body: For questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, contact Login at kontakt@login.no.

policy.download: By downloading, installing, or using the Login app, you accept this Privacy Policy. If you disagree with any part of it, please refrain from using the app.

pwned.title: Pwned
pwned.intro: A gentle reminder from Login: lock your screen before someone else makes your point for you.
pwned.text: It has been {time} since you've been pwned
You after we deleted your assignment while your pc was unlocked
Cafeteria prices when you forget to lock the screen
You after leaving the screen unlocked
Your PC after being left unlocked all day
Your PC after your classmates installed a bitcoin miner while you were in the bathroom
The entire Login lounge watching as your screen is unlocked
You trying to turn back time after leaving the screen unlocked
Me watching my life fall apart after I forgot to lock my screen
I'm just a chill guy, I don't bother locking my screen
Y U NO LOCK YOUR SCREEN
Yeah, if you could go ahead and lock your screen next time, that'd be great.
Disappointed cat is disappointed you left your screen unlocked.

games.diceBody: A simple choice that suits most events.
